creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Mikhail

Could you please:

* Set maintainer-approval flag to + on attachments for ports you are MAINTAINER of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

* Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere). For mroe information and instructions, see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing-poudriere.html
